title: GitHub - yashchimata/statgate: Statistically calibrated ship or block CI gates for LLM evals: paired bootstrap verdicts, power analysis, sequential early stopping, and a GitHub Action
excerpt: Statistically calibrated ship or block CI gates for LLM evals: paired bootstrap verdicts, power analysis, sequential early stopping, and a GitHub Action - yashchimata/statgate
content_html:
Statistically calibrated ship or block CI gates for LLM evals.

Your eval gate is lying to you. A 2 point score drop on a 50 case suite is almost always sampling noise, but a threshold gate treats it as a regression. So teams either block merges on coin flips or learn to ignore the red X, which is worse. LLM outputs are nondeterministic, eval suites are small, and a raw pass rate comparison cannot tell signal from noise.

statgate is the statistics layer between your eval runner and your merge button:

Verdict Exit code Meaning
SHIP 0 The candidate is statistically non-inferior to the baseline.
BLOCK 1 The regression is real. This is not noise.
INCONCLUSIVE 2 The suite is too small to tell, and statgate reports how many cases you would need.

Operational failures (bad files, bad flags) exit with code 3, so your pipeline can always distinguish "the gate decided" from "the gate broke".

statgate makes no LLM calls, sends no network requests, and depends only on numpy, click, rich, and pydantic. It works with any eval runner that can produce a results file.

Install

pip install statgate

Or straight from the repository:

pip install git+https://github.com/yashchimata/statgate

Sixty second tour

The repository ships example data, so every command below works on a fresh clone.

1. Gate a change. Pair the runs by case id, bootstrap the difference, decide:

statgate compare examples/baseline.jsonl examples/candidate.jsonl

That is the SHIP screenshot above. Against a genuinely regressed run the same command blocks, and the error bar shows why: the entire confidence interval sits left of the margin.

2. Learn what your suite can actually detect. Most eval suites cannot support the margins their owners believe in. This command replaces that argument with arithmetic:

statgate power --baseline examples/baseline.jsonl --candidate examples/candidate.jsonl

3. Stop paying for eval cases you do not need. Sequential mode applies always-valid stopping boundaries, so clear verdicts end early. Here the regression is caught after 20 of 80 cases, saving 75% of the eval spend:

statgate sequential examples/baseline.jsonl examples/regression.jsonl --batch-size 20

Sequential mode can also drive your eval command live, batch by batch, with --run "python run_eval.py --offset {start} --limit {count}".

4. Sanity check any results file with statgate validate results.jsonl.

Use it as a pull request gate

jobs:
  eval-gate:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      pull-requests: write
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v7
      - name: Run evals
        run: ./run_evals.sh   # produces baseline.jsonl and candidate.jsonl
      - uses: yashchimata/statgate@v0.1.1
        with:
          baseline: baseline.jsonl
          candidate: candidate.jsonl

The action posts a sticky comment with the verdict and error bars, updates it in place on every push, writes the report to the job summary, and fails the check only on BLOCK (or on INCONCLUSIVE if you set fail-on-inconclusive: true).

See it live: this repository gates its own example evals on every pull request. The open demo pull requests show a real SHIP comment and a real BLOCK with a failed check.

All inputs and baseline strategies (re-run on main, cached artifact, committed baseline) are covered in docs/github-action.md.

Input formats

statgate ingests results files, not eval frameworks. The format is detected from the file, or forced with --adapter.

JSON Lines (one record per line):

{"case_id": "q-001", "score": 0.83, "passed": true}
{"case_id": "q-002", "score": 0.41, "passed": false, "run_index": 0}

case_id identifies the test case and must match between baseline and candidate; the paired analysis it enables typically needs 3 to 10 times fewer cases than an unpaired comparison for the same certainty. Either score or passed is required. Repeated runs of the same case (run_index) are averaged per case, so they are never mistaken for independent samples. Unknown fields are kept as metadata. A JSON array of the same objects and a CSV with the same columns both work.

promptfoo: point statgate at the file written by promptfoo eval -o results.json. Case ids are derived from test and prompt indices, so two exports of the same suite pair cleanly.

Missing your runner's format? Adapters are about 50 lines; open an adapter request with a sample file.

Python API

Everything the CLI does is available as a typed library:

from pathlib import Path

from statgate import GateSettings, Verdict, evaluate_gate
from statgate.adapters import load_records

baseline = load_records(Path("baseline.jsonl"))
candidate = load_records(Path("candidate.jsonl"))
report = evaluate_gate(baseline, candidate, GateSettings(margin=0.02, seed=42))

print(report.verdict, report.interval.low, report.interval.high)
if report.verdict is Verdict.BLOCK:
    raise SystemExit(1)

report carries the interval, p-value, per-side summaries, and the suite size needed when the verdict is INCONCLUSIVE, so you can build custom policies in a pytest fixture or anywhere else.

Configuration

statgate reads statgate.toml from the working directory, or from --config path. The most common values can also be overridden with CLI flags such as --margin, --alpha, --metric, and --seed.

[gate]
metric = "score"        # or "pass_rate"
alpha = 0.05            # significance level; confidence is 1 - alpha
margin = 0.02           # regression size you are willing to tolerate
power = 0.8             # target power for suite size recommendations
resamples = 10000       # bootstrap resamples
permutations = 10000    # permutation test iterations
seed = 42               # set for fully reproducible reports

[sequential]
batch_size = 25
max_cases = 400

The margin is the heart of the policy. margin = 0.02 means "block only when we are confident the candidate is more than 2 points worse". A margin of zero demands proof of strict improvement, which small suites can rarely provide. Full reference in docs/configuration.md.

Works well with judgegate

statgate trusts whatever scores your evals produce. When those scores come from an LLM judge, judgegate verifies the judge itself against human labels before you gate on it. Together they cover both halves of trusting an eval pipeline.

How the statistics work

Short version: per-case paired differences, a BCa bootstrap confidence interval on their mean, a sign-flip permutation test as a cross-check, a non-inferiority decision rule, normal-approximation power analysis, and a mixture SPRT for always-valid sequential stopping. Cases are the resampling unit, so repeated runs of the same case are never mistaken for independent evidence.

The long version, with the reasoning behind each choice and the known limitations, is in docs/methodology.md. The test suite includes calibration checks that verify interval coverage and false positive rates against synthetic data with known ground truth, including under sequential optional stopping.

Development

git clone https://github.com/yashchimata/statgate
cd statgate
python -m venv .venv && . .venv/bin/activate   # .venv\Scripts\activate on Windows
pip install -e ".[dev]"
pytest
ruff check src tests
mypy src

Contributions are welcome, especially new adapters. See CONTRIBUTING.md and the good first issues.

License

MIT

sentences.en: Statistically calibrated ship or block CI gates for LLM evals.
sentences.zh: 用于 LLM 评估的统计校准船舶或块 CI 门。

blocks.html_en: Your eval gate is lying to you. A 2 point score drop on a 50 case suite is almost always sampling noise, but a threshold gate treats it as a regression. So teams either block merges on coin flips or learn to ignore the red X, which is worse. LLM outputs are nondeterministic, eval suites are small, and a raw pass rate comparison cannot tell signal from noise.

sentences.en: Your eval gate is lying to you.
sentences.zh: 你的评估门在骗你。

sentences.en: A 2 point score drop on a 50 case suite is almost always sampling noise, but a threshold gate treats it as a regression.
sentences.zh: 50 个案例套件中的 2 分分数下降几乎总是采样噪声，但阈值门将其视为回归。

sentences.en: So teams either block merges on coin flips or learn to ignore the red X, which is worse.
sentences.zh: 因此，团队要么在抛硬币时阻止合并，要么学会忽略红色 X，这更糟糕。

sentences.en: LLM outputs are nondeterministic, eval suites are small, and a raw pass rate comparison cannot tell signal from noise.
sentences.zh: LLM 输出是不确定的，评估套件很小，原始通过率比较无法区分信号和噪声。

blocks.html_en: BLOCK
The regression is real. This is not noise.

sentences.en: The regression is real.
sentences.zh: 回归是真实的。

sentences.en: This is not noise.
sentences.zh: 这不是噪音。

sentences.en: INCONCLUSIVE
sentences.zh: 尚无定论

sentences.en: The most common values can also be overridden with CLI flags such as --margin, --alpha, --metric, and --seed.
sentences.zh: 最常见的值也可以用 CLI 标志覆盖，例如 --margin、--alpha、--metric 和 --seed。

blocks.html_en: The margin is the heart of the policy. margin = 0.02 means "block only when we are confident the candidate is more than 2 points worse". A margin of zero demands proof of strict improvement, which small suites can rarely provide. Full reference in docs/configuration.md.

sentences.en: The margin is the heart of the policy.
sentences.zh: 保证金是政策的核心。

sentences.en: margin = 0.02 means "block only when we are confident the candidate is more than 2 points worse".
sentences.zh: margin = 0.02 表示“仅当我们确信候选者比 2 分差时才阻止”。

sentences.en: A margin of zero demands proof of strict improvement, which small suites can rarely provide.
sentences.zh: 零利润需要严格改进的证明，而小型套房很少能提供这一点。

sentences.en: Full reference in docs/configuration.md.
sentences.zh: 完整参考文档/configuration.md。

blocks.html_en: Works well with judgegate

sentences.en: Works well with judgegate
sentences.zh: 与法官门配合良好

blocks.html_en: statgate trusts whatever scores your evals produce. When those scores come from an LLM judge, judgegate verifies the judge itself against human labels before you gate on it. Together they cover both halves of trusting an eval pipeline.

sentences.en: statgate trusts whatever scores your evals produce.
sentences.zh: statgate 相信您的评估产生的任何分数。

sentences.en: When those scores come from an LLM judge, judgegate verifies the judge itself against human labels before you gate on it.
sentences.zh: 当这些分数来自法学硕士法官时，法官门会在你对法官进行门控之前根据人类标签验证法官本身。

sentences.en: Together they cover both halves of trusting an eval pipeline.
sentences.zh: 它们一起涵盖了信任评估管道的两部分。

blocks.html_en: How the statistics work

sentences.en: How the statistics work
sentences.zh: 统计数据如何运作

blocks.html_en: Short version: per-case paired differences, a BCa bootstrap confidence interval on their mean, a sign-flip permutation test as a cross-check, a non-inferiority decision rule, normal-approximation power analysis, and a mixture SPRT for always-valid sequential stopping. Cases are the resampling unit, so repeated runs of the same case are never mistaken for independent evidence.

sentences.en: Short version: per-case paired differences, a BCa bootstrap confidence interval on their mean, a sign-flip permutation test as a cross-check, a non-inferiority decision rule, normal-approximation power analysis, and a mixture SPRT for always-valid sequential stopping.
sentences.zh: 简短版本：每个案例的配对差异、平均值的 BCa 自举置信区间、作为交叉检查的符号翻转排列测试、非劣效性决策规则、正态近似功效分析以及用于始终有效的顺序停止的混合 SPRT。

sentences.en: Cases are the resampling unit, so repeated runs of the same case are never mistaken for independent evidence.
sentences.zh: 案例是重采样单位，因此同一案例的重复运行永远不会被误认为是独立证据。

blocks.html_en: The long version, with the reasoning behind each choice and the known limitations, is in docs/methodology.md. The test suite includes calibration checks that verify interval coverage and false positive rates against synthetic data with known ground truth, including under sequential optional stopping.

sentences.en: The long version, with the reasoning behind each choice and the known limitations, is in docs/methodology.md.
sentences.zh: 详细版本包含每个选择背后的推理和已知的限制，位于 docs/methodology.md 中。

sentences.en: The test suite includes calibration checks that verify interval coverage and false positive rates against synthetic data with known ground truth, including under sequential optional stopping.
sentences.zh: 该测试套件包括校准检查，用于验证间隔覆盖范围和针对已知地面事实的合成数据的误报率，包括在顺序可选停止的情况下。

blocks.html_en: Development

sentences.en: Development
sentences.zh: 发展

blocks.html_en: Contributions are welcome, especially new adapters. See CONTRIBUTING.md and the good first issues.

sentences.en: Contributions are welcome, especially new adapters.
sentences.zh: 欢迎贡献，特别是新的适配器。

sentences.en: See CONTRIBUTING.md and the good first issues.
sentences.zh: 请参阅 CONTRIBUTING.md 和良好的第一期。

blocks.html_en: License

sentences.en: License
sentences.zh: 执照

blocks.html_en: MIT

content_html_zh:
用于 LLM 评估的统计校准船舶或块 CI 门。

你的评估门在骗你。 50 个案例套件中的 2 分分数下降几乎总是采样噪声，但阈值门将其视为回归。 因此，团队要么在抛硬币时阻止合并，要么学会忽略红色 X，这更糟糕。 LLM 输出是不确定的，评估套件很小，原始通过率比较无法区分信号和噪声。

statgate 是 eval 运行器和合并按钮之间的统计层：

判决 退出代码 意义
SHIP 0 候选人在统计上不劣于基线。
BLOCK 1 回归是真实的。 这不是噪音。
尚无定论 2 该套件太小，无法判断，statgate 会报告您需要多少个案例。

操作失败（坏文件、坏标志）以代码 3 退出，因此您的管道始终可以区分“门已决定”和“门已损坏”。

statgate 不进行 LLM 调用，不发送网络请求，并且仅依赖于 numpy、click、rich 和 pydantic。 它适用于任何可以生成结果文件的 eval 运行程序。

安装

pip install statgate

或者直接从存储库：

pip install git+https://github.com/yashchimata/statgate

六十秒巡演

存储库提供示例数据，因此下面的每个命令都适用于新的克隆。

1. 门改变。 按案例 ID 配对运行，引导差异，决定：

statgate compare examples/baseline.jsonl examples/candidate.jsonl

这就是上面的 SHIP 截图。 针对真正的回归运行相同的命令块，误差条显示了原因：整个置信区间位于边缘的左侧。

2. 了解您的套件实际可以检测到的内容。 大多数评估套件无法支持其所有者所相信的利润。 此命令用算术替换该参数：

statgate power --baseline examples/baseline.jsonl --candidate examples/candidate.jsonl

3. 停止为不需要的评估案例付费。 顺序模式应用始终有效的停止边界，因此明确的判决会提前结束。 这里的回归是在 80 个案例中的 20 个案例之后捕获的，节省了 75% 的评估支出：

statgate sequential examples/baseline.jsonl examples/regression.jsonl --batch-size 20

顺序模式还可以使用 --run "python run_eval.py --offset {start} --limit {count}" 逐批实时驱动 eval 命令。

4. 使用 statgate validate results.jsonl 检查任何结果文件的完整性。

将其用作拉取请求门

jobs:
  eval-gate:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      pull-requests: write
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v7
      - name: Run evals
        run: ./run_evals.sh   # produces baseline.jsonl and candidate.jsonl
      - uses: yashchimata/statgate@v0.1.1
        with:
          baseline: baseline.jsonl
          candidate: candidate.jsonl

该操作会发布带有判决和错误栏的粘性评论，在每次推送时更新它，将报告写入作业摘要，并且仅在 BLOCK 上检查失败（如果设置了fail-on-inconclusive: true，则在 INCONCLUSIVE 上检查失败）。

实时查看：这个存储库在每个拉取请求上控制自己的示例评估。 打开的演示拉取请求显示了真实的 SHIP 评论和检查失败的真实 BLOCK。

docs/github-action.md 中涵盖了所有输入和基线策略（在主、缓存工件、提交基线上重新运行）。

输入格式

statgate 摄取结果文件，而不是评估框架。 该格式是从文件中检测到的，或使用 --adapter 强制的。

JSON 行（每行一条记录）：

{"case_id": "q-001", "score": 0.83, "passed": true}
{"case_id": "q-002", "score": 0.41, "passed": false, "run_index": 0}

case_id 标识测试用例，并且必须在基线和候选之间匹配；对于相同的确定性，它支持的配对分析通常需要比未配对比较少 3 到 10 倍的案例。 要求得分或通过。 同一案例 (run_index) 的重复运行按案例进行平均，因此它们永远不会被误认为是独立样本。 未知字段保留为元数据。 相同对象的 JSON 数组和具有相同列的 CSV 都可以工作。

Promptfoo：将 statgate 指向 Promptfoo eval -o results.json 写入的文件。 案例 ID 源自测试和提示索引，因此同一套件的两个导出完全配对。

缺少您的跑步者格式吗？ 适配器约50线；使用示例文件打开适配器请求。

Python API

CLI 所做的一切都可以作为类型库提供：

from pathlib import Path

from statgate import GateSettings, Verdict, evaluate_gate
from statgate.adapters import load_records

baseline = load_records(Path("baseline.jsonl"))
candidate = load_records(Path("candidate.jsonl"))
report = evaluate_gate(baseline, candidate, GateSettings(margin=0.02, seed=42))

print(report.verdict, report.interval.low, report.interval.high)
if report.verdict is Verdict.BLOCK:
    raise SystemExit(1)

报告包含间隔、p 值、每边摘要以及结论不确定时所需的套件大小，因此您可以在 pytest 固定装置或其他任何地方构建自定义策略。

配置

statgate 从工作目录或 --config 路径读取 statgate.toml。 最常见的值也可以用 CLI 标志覆盖，例如 --margin、--alpha、--metric 和 --seed。

[gate]
metric = "score"        # or "pass_rate"
alpha = 0.05            # significance level; confidence is 1 - alpha
margin = 0.02           # regression size you are willing to tolerate
power = 0.8             # target power for suite size recommendations
resamples = 10000       # bootstrap resamples
permutations = 10000    # permutation test iterations
seed = 42               # set for fully reproducible reports

[sequential]
batch_size = 25
max_cases = 400

保证金是政策的核心。 margin = 0.02 表示“仅当我们确信候选者比 2 分差时才阻止”。 零利润需要严格改进的证明，而小型套房很少能提供这一点。 完整参考文档/configuration.md。

与法官门配合良好

statgate 相信您的评估产生的任何分数。 当这些分数来自法学硕士法官时，法官门会在你对法官进行门控之前根据人类标签验证法官本身。 它们一起涵盖了信任评估管道的两部分。

统计数据如何运作

简短版本：每个案例的配对差异、平均值的 BCa 自举置信区间、作为交叉检查的符号翻转排列测试、非劣效性决策规则、正态近似功效分析以及用于始终有效的顺序停止的混合 SPRT。 案例是重采样单位，因此同一案例的重复运行永远不会被误认为是独立证据。

详细版本包含每个选择背后的推理和已知的限制，位于 docs/methodology.md 中。 该测试套件包括校准检查，用于验证间隔覆盖范围和针对已知地面事实的合成数据的误报率，包括在顺序可选停止的情况下。

发展

git clone https://github.com/yashchimata/statgate
cd statgate
python -m venv .venv && . .venv/bin/activate   # .venv\Scripts\activate on Windows
pip install -e ".[dev]"
pytest
ruff check src tests
mypy src

欢迎贡献，特别是新的适配器。 请参阅 CONTRIBUTING.md 和良好的第一期。

执照

MIT
